maxref.name: stoplight
maxref.title: stoplight
maxref.digest: Queue and release data based on a control signal
maxref.description: The stoplight object accepts any type of data across multiple throughput inlets. When the first inlet (Inlet 0) receives data, a snapshot of all throughput inlets is captured. If the rightmost control inlet is zero, the snapshot is immediately output to the corresponding outlets. If the control inlet is non-zero, snapshots are queued and held until the control inlet becomes zero, at which point all queued snapshots are released in First-In-First-Out (FIFO) order.

argument.name: num_throughputs
argument.digest: The number of throughput inlet/outlet pairs
argument.description: Specifies how many data channels to manage. Always at least one. The total number of inlets will be this number plus one additional control inlet.

method.name: bang
method.description: In throughput inlets: stores or triggers a snapshot. In control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: int
method.description: In throughput inlets: stores or triggers a snapshot. In control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: float
method.description: In throughput inlets: stores or triggers a snapshot. In control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: list
method.description: In throughput inlets: stores or triggers a snapshot. In control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: anything
method.description: In throughput inlets: stores or triggers a snapshot. In control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

attribute.name: log
attribute.description: When enabled, posts messages to the Max console regarding data reception, queueing, and flushing.
